title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 15 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 15 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 15 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/09/2023
CE I2401 iron ore contract closed up 2.33% at 879 yuan/mt today. Traders were motivated to ship goods and iron ore quotations were firm.The waitand-see sentiment among steel mills intensified, and the overall transaction atmosphere was sluggish. PBF at Shandong port dealt 943-947 yuan/mt; increased 8-12 yuan/mt over yesterday.
